{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags several claims that the evidence does not support, including the probable factual error in the citation chain and the overclaim on the mechanism.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Henderson and Park) but does not articulate the delta clearly; subsequent work is mentioned but not fully engaged with.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, including the problematic Henderson and Park reference, but may have missed other issues.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the probable factual error and the overclaim on the mechanism.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no drift or scope violations.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but may introduce minor regressions; the agent does not identify harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the revisions to address the probable factual error."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags several claims that the evidence does not support, including the probable factual error in the citation chain and the overclaim on the mechanism.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Henderson and Park) but does not articulate the delta clearly; subsequent work is mentioned but not fully engaged with.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, including the problematic Henderson and Park reference, but may have missed other issues.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the probable factual error and the overclaim on the mechanism.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, with no drift or scope violations.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but may introduce minor regressions; the agent does not identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the revisions to address the probable factual error.
